properties.text: Return value of ldap_send_initial_request() in request.c must be NULL-checked before dereference by all callers
properties.assertion: forall call(r, ldap_send_initial_request): r != NULL before deref(r) OR error_handled(r == NULL)

properties.text: Return value of rewrite_session_find() in session.c must be NULL-checked before dereference by all callers
properties.assertion: forall call(r, rewrite_session_find): r != NULL before deref(r) OR error_handled(r == NULL)

properties.assertion: forall call(r, print_psearch): r != NULL before deref(r) OR error_handled(r == NULL)

properties.assertion: forall call(r, print_entry): r != NULL before deref(r) OR error_handled(r == NULL)

properties.text: Return value of ldap_build_add_req() in add.c must be NULL-checked before dereference by all callers
properties.assertion: forall call(r, ldap_build_add_req): r != NULL before deref(r) OR error_handled(r == NULL)

properties.assertion: forall call(r, ldap_add_result_entry): r != NULL before deref(r) OR error_handled(r == NULL)

properties.assertion: forall call(r, ldap_is_write_ready): r != NULL before deref(r) OR error_handled(r == NULL)

properties.text: Return value of ldap_pvt_thread_rdwr_writers() in rdwr.c must be NULL-checked before dereference by all callers
properties.assertion: forall call(r, ldap_pvt_thread_rdwr_writers): r != NULL before deref(r) OR error_handled(r == NULL)

properties.text: Return value of rewrite_session_init() in session.c must be NULL-checked before dereference by all callers
properties.assertion: forall call(r, rewrite_session_init): r != NULL before deref(r) OR error_handled(r == NULL)

properties.text: Return value of ber_strdup_x() must be NULL-checked by all callers before dereference
properties.assertion: forall call ber_strdup_x(): result != NULL before dereference

properties.text: NULL from ber_strdup() must be checked in ldif_open_url() before use with strchr
properties.assertion: forall call ber_strdup() in ldif_open_url: result != NULL before strchr(result, _)

properties.text: NULL from ber_strdup() propagated via ldif_open_url must be checked before ldap_pvt_hex_unescape() dereferences it
properties.assertion: forall flow ber_strdup() -> ldif_open_url -> ldap_pvt_hex_unescape: NULL checked before deref in loop

properties.text: NULL from ber_strdup(pw) must be NULL-checked in tool_bind() before dereference via passwd.bv_val assignment and subsequent use
properties.assertion: forall call ber_strdup(pw) in tool_bind: result != NULL before passwd.bv_val = result AND dereference(passwd.bv_val)

properties.text: NULL from ber_strdup() must be checked in tool_args() before use with strlen
properties.assertion: forall call ber_strdup() in tool_args: result != NULL before strlen(result)

properties.text: NULL from ber_strdup() for SASL options (mech/realm/authcid/authzid/secprops) must be NULL-checked in handle_private_option() in ldapvc.c before dereference
properties.assertion: forall call ber_strdup() in handle_private_option: result != NULL before dereference(result)
